data: Every night in Crossville, TN between 3–4 a.m., silent glowing orbs appear, move freely, form shapes, then vanish without a trace.
Multiple spherical lights appearing and fading away for at least 20 min.
I thought it was a meteor shower until they started to move right and left
Lights over the sea appearing and disappearing, moving in all directions.
White orb, looked like a cube when zoomed in
It was dark. We saw a low object in the sky object not moving. Red, white and yellow flashing lights.
Looks like a snow one and it’s just motionless, so far it’s been over 30 mins
Driving 81 north from scranton saw fast blue green streak front right crossed my vision towards horizon then disappeared
Looked like 3 lights flying in a triangle formation
Multiple starlike objects appearing, moving, disappearing in isolated area for up to two hours.
Saw an abnormally long cigar which wispy white fins fly by and then without U-turn or slowing fly in opposite direction
Three points of lights with a similar red flashing light as seen on standard aircraft’s but the color and pulse were different
Saw a flying orb of light that was floating in place when I first saw it then it shot off to the west at some insane speed
1-3 unidentified objects sighted over treeline by lake.
2 bright orbs that occasionally turned to black discs
Looked like a helicopter at first with blinking lights, it moved fast and was in the same space of air for close to 20 minutes
I was in bed.I went to the bathroom.I see an submarine-like object in the sky
Silent, metallic orb changing colors and flashing lights.
Moving right to left- extreamly high speed. I assumed it was a meteor but realized it was too low
11 fast moving objects spotted in central Arkansas
A bright greenish/white light that hovered and disappeared in a cloud.
Star like object moving in a variety of patterns, including stationary.
3 Red craft seen flying silently and pointed lights at me when recorded. Fleet of the same ufos in the distance the next morning.
A very clear starry morning. One object after another traveling faster than aircraft were passing through the sky, heading East
I was facing south I saw it. It was tossing and turning in the sky.
I've never seen anything like it before
Strange object photographed from oil rig in the gulf, was stationary then moved at unusually high rate of speed to the north.
Saw plane on approach tracking North - noticed object above it - tiny to naked eye - tracking west - steady movement until out of sight
White light landed vertically from the sky into the water after slowing down suddenly before submerging
Our location continues to have close encounters of first second and we now suspect of the third kind
A sphere-like object was hovering in Midlothian, VA
I saw a lumpy white object flying over my neighborhood on Sunday, 10/5/2025 around 5:30 Pm.
Star like object brightly visible over the setting sun that disappeared before our eyes.
We saw white lights rising from the Jemez mountains north of Los Alamos, which rose in pairs and then disappeared.
Triangular flying object with extremely bright rectangular shaped light on front/top of craft. The craft was very large.
Bright light vent vertically across the sky for 3 seconds then disappeared
Spinning lights changing color, 40 foot long flying saucer, no sound for being close by
West to east very far off like furthest away stars , took about 4s to stop abruptly and head back west like a drone. saw another north
Started as one bright light. But between porcupine and evergreen suddenly there were 3 lights stacked in a straight line.
Passing Warsaw exit seen orange sphere pulsing black then took off lasted 15 seconds.
Observed several bright lights in the sky
Green plasmoid/ orb was pursued by a different type of UFO.
10 year old noticed a slow moving "crayon shaped" thing in the sky.
My brother and I saw a triangular shape floating in the sky
Round orb pulsating orange, blue, red, green, white over gulf
Fast UFO, changing directions fast and often, high speed, high altitude over 3000 meter
Triangular viewed from below, bright point at the corners.
Was a flash behind cloud very large green orb appeared and flew across sky at speed ...I thought was lightning then I saw it.
Red lights moving very fast with strange maneuvers. Red lights disappeared and reappeared. One very bright light for 10-15 seconds
Saw post from local in NJDrone subreddit, went outside, 2 objects within 5 minutes of each other
I was driving under it and it looked like a black triangle.
My son saw what looked a very bright flashing red, green, and blue star in the sky
White tic tac seen with reddish ring before and a red dot in the middle
I witnessed a black triangle shaped craft that was hovering slowly and low altitude
A triangular craft with lights on all corners
I was driving home from work and saw some lights in a formation that looked strange in the middle of a field, so I started filming.
It was a red tic tac shape with a red light or tail flying up and it just dissapeared
It looked like a copper disk with a copper trail
Bedroom Window Open. Brilliant white orb, few miles off, darting around in the clouds, at one point it lit up the clouds.
Red star-like object seen in repeating flight pattern accompanied by spot beam from an unseen source.
Pulsating light craft, flashes brightly and takes off at incredible speed
Third time a large drone followed me and acknowledged me in the same general area
Bright, large orb light appeared suddenly, broke into 5 smaller lights in a line then disappeared. large orb reappeared 2 more tims
Lights all seemed to moving down from the sky in formation
Flying object zooming across the sky faster than any human aircraft
Wyze cam my flood lights was off
Flat oval ufo seen driving down 210
White/translucent object that appeared to be changing shape, and a secondary object that disappeared underneath it
10 foot by 10 foot black orb that had flashing green and blue lights around it.
Object skimming just above the ground went right by us at hyper speed
Thought it was a star until it moved. It kept going up from the horizon to the same spot. No flashing lights. Made weird turns.
Driving and saw a bright green orb dropping from the sky at a fast rate.
Object moved from one spot to another at impossible speed
The object was moving across the stars, it then disappeared, after some time that area emitted bright white flashes.
Several orbs hovering and circling above the western mountain range
Multiple spherical lights moving all directions for 1,5 hour
Multiple flashing lights moving in all kinds of directions that would start dim before turning super bright and then slowly going dime
Multitude of lights appeared across the night sky varying speeds and directions
Green flashing light moving in weird ways

These fireball orbs doing circles above the clouds. Making multiple passes around one another
Two orbs moving very closely together, and all the sudden they started circling one another very closely. They were definitely together
Flotation at times. Then it took off under own power
Fast moving formation at high altitude encounters jet
Diamond or v shaped at approx 2000 ft moving west from my pov just N. Of Lebanon, Il. Over Route 4.
Triangle, 3 lights, slow movement then stops
I witnessed red orbs flying south at a low altitude
~30 glowing lights moved W→E, hovered, vanished; interacted like "communicating"; unseen on video; clouds formed after 20 min.
A blurred out peanut shaped object casually flying overhead.
My brother, a friend, and I were on our annual camping trip to a small town on the eastern part of the Baja Peninsula called San Felipe
Heard stealth bomber so looked up. Saw 2 tic tac shaped objects spaced apart one following the other. Bomber approached it tilting righ
Bizarre green light performing incredible maneuvers
Huge bright light over the ocean horizon but the sun was nowhere near it, It was not a ship or a lighthouse.
I was getting ready to go to the gym when I saw a bright light coming straight down from the sky and met up with three others
Small white orb moving along at jet speed to approx elevation; suddenly darts in Eastern direction at impossible speeds
4 large bright orbs in dark sky, stationary, dwarfing Venus; a 5th appeared. Not planes/drones. Lasted ~17 mins, then vanished.
Fuzzy looking.  It started turning and when it did the v shaped turned and started to look like a pair of wings
A big and fast moving sphere!
Started out a smaller ball and 3 colors changing then went to white went side ways appeared to defend a little.
While traveling on Turkey Lake Road in a vehicle sunset happened maybe 40 minutes ago and a light appears in the horizon not high enoug
Moved west to east, parallel to the ground at very high speed
I just came out of no where
A teardrop/pin shape object suspending in sky
It was a bright light coming through the clouds. It continued to move slowly through the sky
Saw unusually large light in the sky stopped and realized it was moving extremely fast . Planes nearby were dwarfed.
3 lights changing orientation floating around each other; each flew away after a time in different directions or dissapeard
Several lights dancing in the sky with different trayectories.
Lights changing speed and directions formed a triangle at one point before vanishing

Triangular craft, 3 lights at each point with a central light, all white lights.
Witnessed a large orb of light that was changing in brightness and shape until completely disappearing.
Geese filmed in slow motion. Object moving quickly down range, L to R.
We thought we saw a small cloud odd cloud that did not move while soaking in the hotsprings. The item was west S/W from our position.
We were pulling into the driveway and both saw the flaming object descending behind the hill in the distance
Several moving flashes of lights above rain clouds

Fast moving star that suddenly disappeared
Heard noises, looked outside. Do not live near airport.   Object was flying too close, red and blue lights, very loud and very big
Went to let the dog in and I see one light in the sky across from me in a farm field, and then a second appears, and then a third
2 small lights that seemed to be attached to a much larger object. An obvious craft of some sort. Thing was huge!
I had just went outside to sit on the patio, it was about 8p.m. and a clear night just then I saw large craft speed across the sky .
Was smoothly moving west, the trajectory went north then east.
A rectangular pattern of large dim lights moving quickly and silently
Saw 4 white lights in the south sky moving east in perfect line. Each one disappeared one after another like is was turning
Saw a flickering light on ride home. Once parked, got out and looked and it is 'dancing' around in the same spot
It looked like a super slow comet. It was bright with a trail but so slow it didn’t make sense.
Slow moving across clear night sky. Trail off behind of object, no noise.
We saw what looked like a star or satellite maneuvering at a very high altitude.
I saw what I thought was a fleet of aircraft coming my way,I went outside to get better look,gone.then,maybe 4 or 5 reappeared
Strange lights in the sky (10/15/25) in Bailey/Sims area
Head lights and what seemed to be a windshield 3 blinking red lights at end of vehicle.
I was in my bedroom when I heard a loud noise coming from outside. As I looked out I saw a ufo.

It looked like a wing of something but just a wing covered in skin
Line of lights slowly moving across the sky

A 3/4” to 1” pyramid. Traveling at approximately 4 mph. Traveling in a straight line practically over head. No wings visible. No sound.

UAP at 30 feet, powered by green plasma

Not high off the ground moving slowly away from the park

Like on a movie theater -- -twinkling green lights blinking side to side with one red light among iit
